codeReview.summary: Memory context building is fully implemented in PersonaService. The build_system_prompt() method builds context from user profile, semantic assertions (insights), and emotional patterns (psych_updates). The session router properly calls persona_service.build_chat_messages_with_persona() before each conversation to inject this context into the LLM prompt. All 303 tests pass.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The PersonaService properly follows the AGENTS.md memory system pattern (PsychUpdate schema, semantic assertions extraction, context building). No deviations detected.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: backend-python/src/services/persona.py:42-180 - build_system_prompt() includes _format_profile_context(), _format_insights_context(), _format_emotional_context() matching AGENTS.md memory patterns

sharedStateObservations.observation: The session router correctly uses persona_service.build_chat_messages_with_persona() for both add_message() and _stream_llm_response() endpoints, ensuring memory context is injected before every conversation.

summary: PASS - Memory context building feature is fully implemented and working. PersonaService.build_system_prompt() correctly builds context from user profile (name, goals, experience), semantic assertions (past insights about user), and emotional patterns (from psych_updates). Session router injects this context into LLM prompts before each conversation. All 303 tests pass. Feature satisfies VAL-MEMORY-003 (Memory Accumulation) and VAL-MEMORY-004 (User Profile Memory).
